description: Cut a Claude Code session's context tokens losslessly — the reversible alternative to /compact.
name: io.github.shayaShav/flatten-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Set to 1 to count token savings exactly via Anthropic's count_tokens endpoint (requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). Off by default: key presence alone never triggers a network call.
environmentVariables.name: FLATTEN_COUNT_EXACT

environmentVariables.description: Optional. API key for the exact token count; ignored unless FLATTEN_COUNT_EXACT=1.
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Model id used for the exact token count (default: claude-haiku-4-5-20251001).
environmentVariables.name: FLATTEN_COUNT_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Set to 1 to also register the in-memory flatten_messages/unflatten_messages tools alongside the three disk tools. Off by default to keep the local tool surface lean.
environmentVariables.name: FLATTEN_INMEMORY_TOOLS

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Claude config dir whose projects/ session store is read (default: ~/.claude). The same variable Claude Code uses for profiles, so an alternate-profile server targets its own sessions automatically; override per call with the claude_dir argument.
environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR

title: flatten-mcp
